title: Cobblemon Blackout
description: What if the player died upon losing any Cobblemon battle?
body:
Ever felt like something was missing from your Cobblemon experience? This might just be what you're looking for. Cobblemon Blackout makes it so that the player dies (or "blacks out") upon losing a battle against any pokemon, player, or npc, just like in the mainline Pokémon games! (Similar to tmetcalfe89's [Cobblemon Whiteout](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-whiteout), but now in datapack form)

## How To Install
This addon must be installed as a Data Pack:
- When creating your Minecraft world, press `[More]`
- Select `[Data Packs]`
- Drag and drop the Cobblemon Blackout .zip file into the data packs page OR press `[Open Pack Folder]` and place it there
- Activate the data pack in-game

*OR*

- For existing worlds, select the world and press `[Edit]`
- Select `[Open World Folder]`
- Navigate to the folder called `[datapacks]` (should be near the top)
- Drag and drop the Cobblemon Blackout .zip file into the folder (no data pack activation needed!)

![Pack Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfe1d0e5a54360e5d8d7c77002c874c4621f6dcd.png)
